name: CMR Surgical
relevance: Versius modular soft-tissue surgical robot; synthetic procedure imagery and force/pose data plus surgical sim are critical since real-procedure data is scarce.
subject: Simulation and synthetic data for CMR Surgical
email_body: Hi Massimiliano, I am writing from DoDAO. I came across CMR Surgical and Versius, the modular soft-tissue surgical robot. We help robotics teams with two things that precede training and testing on hardware: - A clean simulation world for your robot — robot model, workspace, sensors, parts, lighting, and physics, built in Gazebo or Isaac Sim. - Labelled synthetic data for your models — images, masks, depth, pose, demonstration trajectories, and edge cases, shipped in the format your team already uses. For your stack that would likely mean a surgical sim and synthetic procedure imagery plus force and pose data where real-procedure data is scarce. You can see an overview of our services here. Thanks, Ryan Smith DoDAO
